```{r}
table_surgery_rates |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$procedure_rate >= 0.45) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    main_procedure = dplyr::if_else(
      is.na(url),
      .data$main_procedure,
      paste0("[",.data$main_procedure,"](",.data$url,")")),
    .keep="unused") |>
  dplyr::select(!"main_procedure_code") |>
  dplyr::rename(
    "Main procedure"="main_procedure",
    "No of procedures"="n_procedures",
    "Procedure rate"="procedure_rate",
    "Q₁"="q1",
    "Q₂"="q2",
    "Q₃"="q3") |>
  gt(rowname_col = "Main procedure") |>
  fmt_number(decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = "No of procedures", decimals = 0) |>
  cols_width(`Main procedure` ~ pct(35)) |>
  fmt_markdown(columns = "Main procedure") |>
  tab_row_group(
    label = "By ICHE health intervention",
    rows = `Main procedure` != "Any",
    id = "grp_iche") |>
  row_group_order(groups = c(NA, "grp_iche"))
```
